title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Project Nurse, Data Entry Operator Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Project Research Scientist I, Project Technical Support III, Project Nurse, and Data Entry Operator Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, Post-graduation, Any degree, B.E./B. Tech in Computer Sci...
